notes: Core mechanics are present but severely broken: road and river lane row indices overlap/conflict (vehicles on rows 6-10, river on rows 7-11 overlap), frog position uses mixed col/x systems causing misalignment, river platform detection uses wrong math (frog.x drifts incorrectly), home bay collision is miscalculated, and the frog is just a plain green circle with no directional sprite — overall barely playable.
The game logic and rendering are completely misaligned, causing cars to drive on the river while the actual road is empty, making it incredibly confusing and frustrating to play.

The game starts and basic movement works, but core Frogger lane/layout logic is flawed with overlapping road/river rows, incorrect frog drift on platforms, and death-state handling that likely burns all lives almost instantly.
